suite.name: suite S1779627141831 1

kw.name: Open Browser No Popup
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'Open Browser No Popup' found. Did you try using keyword 'SeleniumLibrary.Open Browser' and forgot to use enough whitespace between keyword and arguments?
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Open Browser No Popup' found. Did you try using keyword 'SeleniumLibrary.Open Browser' and forgot to use enough whitespace between keyword and arguments?

test.name: TC_SAUCE_007 — Sort Products By Price Low To High
test.doc: After login with standard_user, access the inventory page and use the sort dropdown to select 'Price (low to high)'. Verify products are reordered from lowest to highest price.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: No keyword with name 'Open Browser No Popup' found. Did you try using keyword 'SeleniumLibrary.Open Browser' and forgot to use enough whitespace between keyword and arguments?

test.name: TC_SAUCE_008 — Remove An Item From The Cart
test.doc: After login with standard_user, add a product to the cart from the inventory page, navigate to the cart, then click 'Remove'. Verify the cart is empty and the cart badge counter is gone.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: No keyword with name 'Open Browser No Popup' found. Did you try using keyword 'SeleniumLibrary.Open Browser' and forgot to use enough whitespace between keyword and arguments?

test.name: TC_SAUCE_009 — Logout Via Burger Menu
test.doc: After login with standard_user, click the hamburger menu, then click 'Logout'. Verify the user is redirected to the login page with empty username and password fields.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: No keyword with name 'Open Browser No Popup' found. Did you try using keyword 'SeleniumLibrary.Open Browser' and forgot to use enough whitespace between keyword and arguments?

suite.doc: Test suite for SauceDemo — TC_SAUCE_007, TC_SAUCE_008, TC_SAUCE_009
suite.status: Suite setup failed: No keyword with name 'Open Browser No Popup' found. Did you try using keyword 'SeleniumLibrary.Open Browser' and forgot to use enough whitespace between keyword and arguments?
